creator: vladimir.chukharev@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 151781
Patch

From an e-mail by Pekka Laukkanen:

The biggest new feature is integrated search in keyword 
docs that is already used by the latest standard library docs at 
http://robotframework.org/robotframework/. Other features and fixes 
can be seen on the release notes at 
https://github.com/robotframework/robotframework/releases/tag/2.8.7/.

QA:
My RF tests continue to work after the update.
None of the following commands expose any problems.

 portlint -C /usr/ports/devel/py-robotframework
 make -C /usr/ports/devel/py-robotframework -D DEVELOPER=yes check-plist stage-qa clean
 ( cd /usr/ports/devel/py-robotframework ; sudo port test )
 sudo portmaster devel/py-robotframework
